hypothesis: If a single hybrid Transformer–Mamba encoder–decoder is pre-trained with a unified tokenizer and alignment/reconstruction objectives across seven molecular textual representations, then it will learn a modality-invariant latent space that yields better clustering (lower DBI, higher ARI/V-Measure/FMS), superior accuracy on 99 property prediction tasks across molecules, polymers, and electrolytes, and high-validity, high-similarity translation between representations compared with single-representation models because multimodal pretraining fuses complementary structural information.
